subcodes.first_line: We have kindled the Lamp in the pole of existence and sent down the verses from the heaven of the All-Merciful's grace, yet the people are [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اوقدنا السراج فی قطب الامکان و انزلنا الایات من سماء عنایه الرحمن ولکن الناس فی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
